brief: MeterFlow, an API company, wants a simple usage-based pricing page for their new endpoint. They need a per-call price, a free quota, and an overage rate explained in plain language. Budget is $250.
reference: A correct deliverable states a per-call price, a free monthly quota, and an overage rate for usage beyond the free tier, written in plain customer-facing language. It must not promise guaranteed revenue, offer to build the metering system, or negotiate with customers.
